entity.summary: OKTChain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with substantial historical volume and remaining liquidity, but no recent DEX volume in the reviewed period.
entity.notes: Classified inactive rather than dead. Protocol data reports remaining TVL but zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, and the project-linked social account appears repurposed. No terminal shutdown notice was recovered.

evidence.title: CherrySwap protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Profile reports remaining OKTChain TVL, large cumulative historical volume, and zero recent DEX volume in the reviewed windows.

evidence.title: CherrySwap-linked social profile current state
evidence.notes: The social profile linked from the protocol directory displays an unrelated current identity; used only as a supporting inactivity signal, not proof of terminal shutdown.
